description: RAG Web Browser Worker - Search Google and extract web page content for LLM processing. Enter a search query or a URL of a specific web page to scrape

properties.title: Search term or URL
properties.name: query
properties.description: Enter Google Search keywords or a URL of a specific web page to scrape

properties.title: Maximum results
properties.name: maxResults
properties.description: The maximum number of top organic Google Search results

properties.title: Output format
properties.name: outputFormat
properties.description: Select output format for extracted content

properties.title: Request timeout (seconds)
properties.name: requestTimeoutSecs
properties.description: Maximum time in seconds for the request

properties.title: Remove HTML elements (CSS selector)
properties.name: removeElementsCssSelector
properties.description: CSS selector for elements to remove
properties.default: nav, footer, script, style, noscript, svg, img[src^='data:'], [role="alert"], [role="banner"], [role="dialog"], [role="alertdialog"], [role="region"][aria-label*="skip" i], [aria-modal="true"]
